IF OBJECT_ID('silver.sp_load_customers', 'P') IS NOT NULL
    DROP PROCEDURE silver.sp_load_customers;
GO

CREATE PROCEDURE silver.sp_load_customers
AS
BEGIN
    TRUNCATE TABLE silver.customers;

    INSERT INTO silver.customers
    (
        customer_id,
        customer_name,
        city,
        signup_date
    )
    SELECT
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(customer_id)) AS INT),
        LTRIM(RTRIM(customer_name)),
        NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(city)), ''),
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(signup_date)) AS DATE)
    FROM bronze.customers
    WHERE TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(customer_id)) AS INT) IS NOT NULL;
END;
GO

IF OBJECT_ID('silver.sp_load_products', 'P') IS NOT NULL
    DROP PROCEDURE silver.sp_load_products;
GO

CREATE PROCEDURE silver.sp_load_products
AS
BEGIN
    TRUNCATE TABLE silver.products;

    INSERT INTO silver.products
    (
        product_id,
        product_name,
        category,
        unit_price
    )
    SELECT
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(product_id)) AS INT),
        LTRIM(RTRIM(product_name)),
        NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(category)), ''),
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(unit_price)) AS DECIMAL(18,2))
    FROM bronze.products
    WHERE TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(product_id)) AS INT) IS NOT NULL;
END;
GO

IF OBJECT_ID('silver.sp_load_orders', 'P') IS NOT NULL
    DROP PROCEDURE silver.sp_load_orders;
GO

CREATE PROCEDURE silver.sp_load_orders
AS
BEGIN
    TRUNCATE TABLE silver.orders;

    INSERT INTO silver.orders
    (
        order_id,
        customer_id,
        product_id,
        quantity,
        order_date
    )
    SELECT
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(order_id)) AS INT),
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(customer_id)) AS INT),
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(product_id)) AS INT),
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(quantity)) AS INT),
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(order_date)) AS DATE)
    FROM bronze.orders
    WHERE TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(order_id)) AS INT) IS NOT NULL;
END;
GO


IF OBJECT_ID('silver.usp_exec', 'P') IS NOT NULL
    DROP PROCEDURE silver.usp_exec;
GO

CREATE PROCEDURE silver.usp_exec
    @load_run_id NVARCHAR(100),
    @procname NVARCHAR(256)
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    DECLARE @sql NVARCHAR(MAX);

    IF @procname IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(@procname)) = ''
    BEGIN
        THROW 50001, 'procname is required', 1;
    END;

    SET @sql = N'EXEC ' + @procname;

    EXEC sp_executesql @sql;
END;
GO
